blockingIssues.description: Candidate scoping is still incorrect. `findTerminalConflictingOutcomes()` accepts any completed/failed node whose dependents are terminal (`dependents.allSatisfy(...)`). Because winner selection is only invoked after `allTerminal` is true (line 311), this condition is satisfied for completed prerequisite/internal nodes as well, so non-terminal outcomes can still enter reconciliation candidates.

Winner-reason attribution is not fully runner-up delta based. The success check uses `sortedCandidates.dropFirst().contains` to detect any failed candidate, so with 3+ candidates it can emit `SUCCESS_OVER_FAILURE` even when the runner-up is successful. This violates deterministic winner-vs-runner-up attribution intent for persisted reason codes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit scrutiny-facing checklist item that handoff claims followedProcedure: true only when all required validator surfaces listed by the skill have been executed and recorded in handoff evidence.
